message:
fix(mermaid): rewrite Gantt bar positioning to use actual date ranges

Replace the naive index-based bar placement (task_global_idx/total_tasks)
with date-proportional positioning using actual start_days and durations
relative to the timeline span. Add milestone rendering as diamond glyphs
for zero-duration tasks. Use i64 arithmetic with saturating ops and
clamping to prevent overflow on large date spans.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
